queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('record') AND throughput_rate > 200.0 GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('warehouse') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('warehouse') AND throughput_rate > 400.0 AND facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2') ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS match_cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('event') AND operation_mode != 'manual' GROUP BY facility_zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY match_cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS time_block, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE match_all('warehouse')) AS warehouse_hits, COUNT(*) AS total_events, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE match_all('warehouse')) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS hit_rate_pct FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY time_block ORDER BY time_block ASC

SELECT _timestamp, log, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY _timestamp DESC) AS recency_rank FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('record') ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, recency_rank ASC

queries.sql: SELECT 'primary_hits' AS source, _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('warehouse') AND throughput_rate >= 500.0 UNION ALL SELECT 'secondary_hits' AS source, _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('event') AND throughput_rate < 500.0 ORDER BY source ASC, throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT approx_distinct(source_ip) AS ipc, COUNT(*) AS count, attack_name FROM "{stream}" WHERE filter_result = 'block'   AND issue_type != 'N/A'   AND attack_name NOT LIKE 'Malicious%'   AND geo_country IN ('US', 'BR', 'DE')   AND NOT regexp_like(http_request, '127\.0\.0\.1|192\.168\.|localhost|test|sleep', 'i')   AND NOT regexp_like(user_agent_str, 'nessus|sleep|test|python|script', 'i')   AND re_not_match(uri_path, 'favicon|etc|git|blocked|admin|config|bash|login')   AND re_not_match(user_agent_str, '127.0.0.1|nessus|sleep|test') GROUP BY attack_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY ipc DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT page_slug, COUNT(_timestamp) as cnt, order_ref as "key", (CASE WHEN auth_result = filter_result THEN 'new' ELSE 'old' END) as "session" FROM "{stream}" WHERE (match_all('warehouse') AND page_slug = 'cartPage')   AND info_tag IS NOT NULL   AND passthrough_flag = 'false'   AND status_code = '200'   AND graphql_operation = 'verifyPayment'   AND (user_agent_str NOT LIKE '%bot%' AND user_agent_str NOT LIKE '%test%') GROUP BY "key", page_slug, "session" HAVING (cnt >= 1 AND "session" = 'old') ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT page_slug, COUNT(_timestamp) as cnt, order_ref as "key",
  (CASE WHEN auth_result = filter_result THEN 'new' ELSE 'old' END) as "session"
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (match_all('warehouse') AND page_slug = 'cartPage')
  AND bot_flag IS NULL
  AND passthrough_flag = 'false'
  AND (info_tag IS NULL OR info_tag NOT LIKE '%NonexistentPattern%')
  AND ((order_ref IS NULL OR order_ref != 'ORD-999'))
  AND (user_agent_str IS NULL OR user_agent_str != 'curl/7.88.1')
  AND status_code = '200'
  AND graphql_operation = 'verifyPayment'
  AND (user_agent_str NOT LIKE '%bot%' AND user_agent_str NOT LIKE '%test%' AND user_agent_str NOT LIKE '%curl%')
GROUP BY "key", page_slug, "session"
HAVING (cnt >= 1 AND "session" = 'old')
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT _timestamp, log, facility_zone, operation_mode, api_name
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE match_all('warehouse')
  AND str_match_ignore_case(log, 'batch')
  AND facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2')
ORDER BY _timestamp DESC
LIMIT 15

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
  MAX(load_factor) AS max_load
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE match_all('warehouse')
  AND str_match_ignore_case(log, 'event')
  AND throughput_rate >= 100.0
GROUP BY facility_zone
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  AND AVG(throughput_rate) > 100.0
ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, response_code AS status FROM "{stream}" WHERE uri_path LIKE '%/api/%' GROUP BY status ORDER BY status ASC
